channel.title: GitHub F# Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of F# in GitHub

item.title: artempyanykh/marksman
item.description: Write Markdown with code assist and intelligence in the comfort of your favourite editor.

item.title: fsprojects/Paket
item.description: A dependency manager for .NET with support for NuGet packages and Git repositories.

item.title: dotnet/fsharp
item.description: The F# compiler, F# core library, F# language service, and F# tooling integration for Visual Studio
